violations.text: The front counter hand sink is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster must be posted to notify food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

The cabinet in the front area, and floor in back storage room has an accumulation of soil residue, old droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026
Establishment is lacking handwashing signage. A sign or poster must be posted to notify food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2024
